subject: fix(review): address 12 code review findings across 10 components
body:
Fixes bugs, UX issues, and code quality problems found during review sweep:

1. MediaTab: Replace mutable cellIndex in render with useMemo+Map pattern
   (prevents StrictMode double-render bugs)
2. BottomSheet: Add onTouchCancel handler to prevent sheet freezing when
   touch is interrupted by system UI
3. ExportButtons: Replace fixed setTimeout(300) in PDF multi-page export
   with double waitForPaint() for reliability on slow devices
4. ContextBar: Improve delete confirmation label from "Delete p1?" to
   "Delete page 1?" for clarity
5. LogoUploader: Add 10MB file size validation before DataURL conversion
   to prevent browser freezes on large files
6. SaveLoadModal: Include time in default design name for uniqueness when
   saving multiple designs on the same day
7. MobileNav: Show active tab indicator even when bottom sheet is closed
   so users know which tab will open on next tap
8. PlatformPreview: Reset showTips state when platform changes to prevent
   displaying stale tips from previous platform
9. StyleTab: Extract repeated overlay type button into OverlayTypeButton
   component, reducing ~50 lines of duplication
10. TemplatesTab: Make empty layout filter message actionable with
    suggestion to change shape or category
11. SaveLoadModal: Add aria-label to search input for screen readers

Tags: review, bugfix, ux, accessibility, code-quality
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: patch
